text: One night Allah's Messenger () offered the prayer in the Mosque. and the people followed him. The next night he also offered the. prayer and too many people gathered. On the third and the fourth nights more people gathered, but Allsh's Messenger () did not Gome out to them. In the moming he said, *I saw what you were doing and nothing but the fear that it (.e. the prayer) might be enjoined on you, stopped me from coming to you' And that happened in the month of Ramadan. oS . Sahih al-Bukhari 1129
